class.name: UUID
class.brief_description: Utility class for generating, parsing, and handling RFC 4122 UUIDs.
class.description: The [UUID] class provides functionality to work with Universally Unique Identifiers (UUIDs). It supports generating random UUIDs (v4), name-based UUIDs using MD5 (v3) or SHA-1 (v5), and provides various conversion methods between strings, byte arrays, and [Vector4i]. Additionally, it includes an instance-based map for storing [Variant] values keyed by UUID strings.

method.name: assign_value
method.description: Assigns a [param value] to the given [param uuid] in the internal map. Returns [code]true[/code] if successful.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all entries from the internal map.

method.name: create_v3_godot_bytes
method.description: Generates a version 3 (name-based MD5) UUID as a [PackedByteArray].

method.name: create_v3_godot_string
method.description: Generates a version 3 (name-based MD5) UUID as a [String].

method.name: create_v3_godot_vector4i
method.description: Generates a version 3 (name-based MD5) UUID as a [Vector4i].

method.name: create_v4_stduuid_bytes
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [PackedByteArray] using the [code]stduuid[/code] library.

method.name: create_v4_stduuid_string
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [String] using the [code]stduuid[/code] library.

method.name: create_v4_stduuid_vector4i
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [Vector4i] using the [code]stduuid[/code] library.

method.name: create_v4_uuidv4_bytes
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [PackedByteArray] using the [code]uuid_v4[/code] library.

method.name: create_v4_uuidv4_string
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [String] using the [code]uuid_v4[/code] library.

method.name: create_v4_uuidv4_vector4i
method.description: Generates a version 4 (random) UUID as a [Vector4i] using the [code]uuid_v4[/code] library.

method.name: create_v5_stduuid_bytes
method.description: Generates a version 5 (name-based SHA-1) UUID as a [PackedByteArray].

method.name: create_v5_stduuid_string
method.description: Generates a version 5 (name-based SHA-1) UUID as a [String].

method.name: create_v5_stduuid_vector4i
method.description: Generates a version 5 (name-based SHA-1) UUID as a [Vector4i].

method.name: equals
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the two UUIDs are equivalent.

method.name: erase_key
method.description: Removes the entry for the given [param uuid] from the internal map. Returns [code]true[/code] if the key existed.

method.name: erase_value
method.description: Removes all entries with the given [param value] from the internal map. Returns [code]true[/code] if any entries were removed.

method.name: get_keys_as_bytes
method.description: Returns all keys in the internal map as a concatenated [PackedByteArray] of UUID bytes.

method.name: get_keys_as_strings
method.description: Returns all keys in the internal map as a [PackedStringArray] of UUID strings.

method.name: get_keys_as_vector4i
method.description: Returns all keys in the internal map as an [Array] of [Vector4i].

method.name: get_map_size
method.description: Returns the number of entries in the internal map.

method.name: get_max_uuid
method.description: Returns the "Max" UUID string: [code]ffffffff-ffff-ffff-ffff-ffffffffffff[/code].

method.name: get_namespace_dns
method.description: Returns the RFC 4122 DNS namespace UUID string.

method.name: get_namespace_oid
method.description: Returns the RFC 4122 OID namespace UUID string.

method.name: get_namespace_url
method.description: Returns the RFC 4122 URL namespace UUID string.

method.name: get_namespace_x500
method.description: Returns the RFC 4122 X.500 namespace UUID string.

method.name: get_nil_uuid
method.description: Returns the "Nil" UUID string: [code]00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000[/code].

method.name: get_uuid_variant
method.description: Returns the variant of the UUID (e.g., RFC 4122).

method.name: get_uuid_version
method.description: Returns the version number of the given [param uuid].

method.name: get_value
method.description: Returns the value associated with the given [param uuid], or [param default_value] if the key is not found.

method.name: get_values
method.description: Returns an [Array] of all values stored in the internal map.

method.name: has_key
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the internal map contains the given [param uuid].

method.name: has_value
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the internal map contains the given [param value].

method.name: hash_uuid
method.description: Calculates a 64-bit hash of the UUID string.

method.name: is_nil
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param uuid] is the Nil UUID.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param uuid] is a syntactically valid UUID (string, byte array, or [Vector4i]).

method.name: to_bytes_from_variant
method.description: Converts the given [param uuid] (string, byte array, or [Vector4i]) to a [PackedByteArray].

method.name: to_string_from_variant
method.description: Converts the given [param uuid] (string, byte array, or [Vector4i]) to a standard UUID string.

method.name: to_vector4i_from_variant
method.description: Converts the given [param uuid] (string, byte array, or [Vector4i]) to a [Vector4i].

constants.constant: Version 3: Name-based UUID using MD5 hashing.
Version 5: Name-based UUID using SHA-1 hashing.
